title: Better Line Break
description: Better line-breaking mod for not alphabet characters.
body:
### **This is a mod for players using not alphabet!**

The line-breaking algorithm of Minecraft is too bad.

This fixes it and provide a better algorithm.

![BAD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfda5ef395b8539aed50f6a8f9a24f93d5dee4c4_0.webp)
![GOOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/920b056423de18981adb1c568a064f9ed5f8f53b.png)

## Config:
- VANILLA: Break lines with only white-spaces. :P
- NON_ASCII: Break lines with all non-ascii characters. (All Unicode chars are supported.)
- PHRASE: Break lines with phrases. (Japanese, Simplified-Chinese, Traditional-Chinese, Thai are supported. And you have to change the game language.)
 
## Additional Dependencies:
Only 1.14.4(Fabric) needs [Auto Config Updated API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/auto-config-updated-api).

## Notes:
- This is a client-side mod.
- Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks.
 

## Mod compatibilities:
- Optifine(1.7.10, 1.12.2)
- Smooth Font(1.7.10, 1.12.2)
- Better Questing(1.7.10, 1.12.2)
 

## Mod Incompatibilities:
- Wrap Fix
